message:
chore: Update test fixtures for precision/scale fields and dependency sync

- Add precision/scale fields to FieldInfo test fixtures in expected.rs
- Sync Cargo.lock and workspace dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,6 +59,9 @@ asupersync = { path = "../asupersync" }
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1"
 
+# Validation
+regex = "1"
+
 # Logging
 tracing = "0.1"

@@ -13,3 +13,5 @@ workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
+regex.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true

@@ -355,6 +355,8 @@ mod tests {
                     column_name: "id",
                     sql_type: SqlType::BigInt,
                     sql_type_override: None,
+                    precision: None,
+                    scale: None,
                     nullable: true,
                     primary_key: true,
                     auto_increment: true,
@@ -370,6 +372,8 @@ mod tests {
                     column_name: "name",
                     sql_type: SqlType::Text,
                     sql_type_override: Some("VARCHAR(100)"),
+                    precision: None,
+                    scale: None,
                     nullable: false,
                     primary_key: false,
                     auto_increment: false,
@@ -385,6 +389,8 @@ mod tests {
                     column_name: "age",
                     sql_type: SqlType::Integer,
                     sql_type_override: None,
+                    precision: None,
+                    scale: None,
                     nullable: true,
                     primary_key: false,
                     auto_increment: false,
@@ -400,6 +406,8 @@ mod tests {
                     column_name: "team_id",
                     sql_type: SqlType::BigInt,
                     sql_type_override: None,
+                    precision: None,
+                    scale: None,
                     nullable: true,
                     primary_key: false,
                     auto_increment: false,
@@ -511,6 +519,8 @@ mod tests {
                     column_name: "id",
                     sql_type: SqlType::BigInt,
                     sql_type_override: None,
+                    precision: None,
+                    scale: None,
                     nullable: true,
                     primary_key: true,
                     auto_increment: true,
